name: Beer Catfish
recipeIngredient: 4 3 Oz. Catfish Fillets, cut into 3-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 1 cup of flour, beer, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Dip the catfish strips in the remaining flour, then coat with the batter.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a deep-fryer or skillet to frying temperature.
5. Carefully lower the coated catfish strips into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown.
7. Using tongs, remove the fried catfish strips from the oil and drain on absorbent towels.
8. Serve hot with your favorite sauce.
9. Yield: 4 servings.
